raw.problem: Factory operators cannot see where energy is wasted in real time.
raw.opportunity_size: Indian industrial energy spend ~$120B/yr; 10-15% is recoverable.
raw.why_now: Rising grid tariffs force manufacturers to manage demand actively.
raw.success_scenario: If energy prices keep rising, ROI is immediate.

structured.tagline: Factories see and recover wasted energy in real time.
structured.problem: Factory operators cannot see where energy is wasted in real time.
structured.opportunity_size: Indian industrial energy spend ~$120B/yr; 10-15% is recoverable.
structured.differentiator: Ex-Schneider energy engineers deploying SaaS + edge sensors across 12 factories.
structured.solution: SaaS plus edge sensors for real-time factory energy monitoring.
